title: scorzoneroides muelleri subsp. austromaroccana
intro: Scorzoneroides muelleri subsp. austromaroccana, also known as Austromaroccan scorzoneroides, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The root of Scorzoneroides muelleri subsp. austromaroccana has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
